result: If I could change the world in one way, I’d wish for a universal culture of deep empathy—where every person genuinely tries to understand others’ perspectives and experiences before judging or acting. I imagine a reality where kindness and curiosity are the default responses, leading to far less conflict, inequality, and suffering. It’s a lofty dream, but I think if empathy became the norm, many of the other problems we face—environmental neglect, social injustice, political polarization—would start to unravel naturally.

I imagine a reality where kindness and curiosity are the default responses, leading to far less conflict, inequality, and suffering. It’s a lofty dream, but I think if empathy became the norm, many of the other problems we face—environmental neglect, social injustice, political polarization—would start to unravel naturally.
